docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUSTESEN, ELISABETH AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENSON, JOHN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2015 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF JUSTESEN, ELISABETH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JUSTESEN, ELISABETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEVENSON, JOHN $6,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,515.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,200.00 DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (L) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (4 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF JUSTESEN, ELISABETH
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY JUSTESEN, ELISABETH AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENSON, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED MAR-17-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENSON, JOHN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-14-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-14-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
